mood_phrase: I want a calm beach day near the harbour.

plan.where: Head to Balmoral Beach for a protected harbour swim and a slow walk.
plan.why: It matches the calm solo mood and has reliable facilities nearby.
plan.conditions_summary: Protected harbour water, gentle wind, and easy walking conditions.
plan.gentle_warning: Parking can be tight on sunny weekends.

user_notes: Try this again on a weekday.
